## Type of change
- [ ] feat    -- new feature
- [ ] fix     -- bug fix
- [ ] refactor -- no functional change
- [ ] test    -- tests only
- [ ] chore   -- config / deps / build
- [ ] ci      -- CI/CD workflow change
- [ ] docs    -- documentation only

## Checklist
- [ ] Unit tests added or updated
- [ ] Flyway migration added if DB schema changed (V{n}__description.sql)
- [ ] Swagger / OpenAPI annotations updated if endpoint changed
- [ ] No hardcoded values -- use application.yml
- [ ] No secrets committed -- use .env
- [ ] CI passes
